name: openrouter-code-agent
description: Claude Agent SDK-shaped query() coding agent over OpenRouter models.

scripts.check: node --check bin/oragent.js && for f in src/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.format: npx prettier --write "src/**/*.{js,ts,tsx,json}" --tab-width 4 --print-width 100 --single-quote true --semi true --trailing-comma es5 --arrow-parens always --bracket-spacing true --end-of-line lf
